title: Shark Shark Race R Pro GP Vortex TC-2

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with Multi-Density EPS Liner

technical_analysis: The Shark Race R Pro GP Vortex TC-2 represents the pinnacle of Grand Prix homologation technology, featuring a monocoque carbon fiber shell engineered for maximum rigidity and minimal weight. The internal structure utilizes a multi-density EPS liner with an integrated energy-absorbing system that adapts to impact vectors specific to high-speed circuit racing, ensuring superior protection without compromising head mobility. Its aerodynamic profile is meticulously sculpted using Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) simulations to reduce drag coefficients while optimizing airflow through the chin bar and visor channels.
marketing_description: Dominate the track with the Shark Race R Pro GP Vortex TC-2, the ultimate weapon for professional circuit racing. Designed exclusively for Grand Prix homologation, this helmet combines uncompromising safety with cutting-edge aerodynamics to give you a competitive edge at every turn. The lightweight carbon fiber construction ensures that speed feels effortless, while the advanced ventilation system keeps you cool even during the most intense sessions.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Shark Race R Pro GP Vortex TC-2: a FIM/FIA homologated full-face racing helmet featuring carbon fiber shell, ultra-lightweight design, and superior aerodynamics for professional circuit racing.
yoast_focuskw: Shark Race R Pro GP Vortex TC-2
